hero.heading: Gapflow and Zoom
hero.subheading: Automate video meetings, webinars, and virtual events

documentation.title: Getting Started with Zoom
documentation.description: Connect Zoom to Gapflow and automate meetings, webinars, and video conferencing workflows.

documentation.title: Webinar Automation
documentation.description: Create and manage webinars with automated registration, reminders, and follow-up sequences.

documentation.title: Recording & Transcription
documentation.description: Automatically process recordings, generate transcripts, and distribute content after meetings.

tutorials.title: Automated Webinar Funnel
tutorials.description: Build a complete webinar system with registration, reminders, attendance tracking, and follow-up automation.

tutorials.title: Sales Demo Workflow
tutorials.description: Create automated demo scheduling that integrates with CRM, sends invites, and logs all activity.

tutorials.title: Meeting Recording Pipeline
tutorials.description: Set up automatic recording processing with transcription, highlights extraction, and content distribution.

faqs.question: How do I connect Zoom?
faqs.answer: Create a Zoom App or use OAuth authentication. Server-to-Server OAuth is recommended for automation workflows.

faqs.question: Can I create recurring meetings?
faqs.answer: Yes! Create one-time or recurring meetings with full control over schedule, settings, and participants.

faqs.question: What about webinars?
faqs.answer: Automate webinar creation, registration, reminders, and follow-ups. Track attendance and engagement automatically.

faqs.question: How do I access recordings?
faqs.answer: Get notified when recordings are ready, download files, generate transcripts, and share links automatically.

faqs.question: Can I track attendance?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Get participant lists, track join/leave times, attention tracking, and engagement metrics.

faqs.question: What about breakout rooms?
faqs.answer: Create and manage breakout rooms programmatically. Assign participants and control room settings automatically.

testimonials.quote: Webinar automation increased registrations 300%. Entire funnel runs on autopilot from sign-up to follow-up.
testimonials.author: Amanda Foster

testimonials.quote: Demo scheduling is seamless. Sales reps never touch Zoom manually, everything syncs with Salesforce.
testimonials.author: Carlos Rivera

testimonials.quote: Recording processing is magic. Transcripts and highlights ready within minutes of meeting end.
testimonials.author: Dr. Emily Chen

testimonials.quote: Event coordination simplified. 500-person virtual conference managed with automated workflows.
testimonials.author: Marcus Johnson

limits.title: API Rate Limits
limits.description: Varies by endpoint and account type. Pro/Business: medium limits, Enterprise: higher limits. Use webhooks for real-time updates.

limits.title: Concurrent Meetings
limits.description: Meeting limits based on plan. Pro: 1 meeting, Business: varies, Enterprise: custom. Plan accordingly for automation.

limits.title: Recording Storage
limits.description: Cloud recording storage based on plan. Free: 40min limit. Paid: 1GB per license. Consider external storage for archives.

limits.title: Participant Limits
limits.description: Max participants vary by plan (100/300/500/1000). Large meetings may need Enterprise licensing.
